hypothesis: If LLM-based extraction uses the o4-mini model with one-shot prompting that includes a highly detailed in-context example, then it will achieve significantly higher structural and parametric precision, recall, and F1 in converting materials synthesis descriptions into PROV-DM graphs than zero-shot prompting or the tested GPT-4.1 variants, because the complex example provides task-specific grounding that improves node/edge and attribute identification.
